## ensureArray() function

Ensures the input is an array. If already an array, returns it as-is. If a single item, wraps it in an array. Preserves readonly status of input arrays.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function ensureArray<T>(items: T): EnsureArrayResult<T>;
```

**Returns:**

[EnsureArrayResult](./ts-utils.ensurearrayresult.md)<!-- -->&lt;T&gt;

The input array unchanged, or a new array containing the single item.
